summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RangeFinder VA/MD shooting range directory. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend loads correctly with proper stats (8 total, 5 VA, 3 MD ranges). Search functionality works for city/ZIP searches. Range detail pages display comprehensive information. Navigation between pages works correctly. Main issue: Filter functionality not working properly - filters don't trigger API calls to filter results.

integration_issues.issue: Filter checkboxes (Indoor, Outdoor, Handgun, USPSA, etc.) don't trigger API calls with filter parameters. All filters still show '8 Ranges Found' instead of filtering results

passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct header and stats (8 total, 5 VA, 3 MD)
All 8 range cards display properly on homepage
Search by city (Chantilly) returns 1 result correctly
Search by ZIP code (20151) returns 1 result correctly
Radius selector works and can be changed
Range detail pages load with comprehensive information
Navigation from homepage to range detail pages works
Navigation back from range detail to homepage works
All backend API endpoints working (18/18 tests passed)
Individual range retrieval by ID works
Error handling for non-existent ranges works (404 response)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix filter functionality in frontend - filters are not triggering API calls with filter parameters. The searchRanges function needs to be called when filters are changed, but currently filters only update local state without making new API requests.
